{{Quote|You were the executive officer of the Star Destroyer ''Forger'' when it suppressed a rebellion on Gra Ploven by creating steam clouds which boiled alive two hundred thousand Ploven in three coastal cities.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], to [[Davith Sconn]]|<ref name="SoL" />}}
'''Gra Ploven''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

==History==
{{Quote|Immoral? The little finbacks had refused to pay their defense assessments, making the Grand Moff rather cranky. But, then, that was late in the day for the Empire, and Grand Moff Dureya was cranky rather a lot of the time.|Davith Sconn, to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="SoL" />}}
Gra Ploven was the homeworld of the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Ploven]].<ref name="TCSWE-Ploven">{{CSWECite|III|31|Ploven}}</ref>

The planet fell within the [[Oversector/Legends|priority sector]] of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Dureya]] under the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="SoL" /> Around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="TCSWE-Dureya">{{CSWECite|I|216|Dureya, Grand Moff}}</ref> the inhabitants rebelled against the Empire.<ref name="TCSWE-Forger">{{CSWECite|I|288|''Forger''}}</ref> When they refused to make the expected contribution to the Galactic Empire's war effort, 200,000 of the native Ploven were boiled alive when the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Forger]]'' carried out a punitive [[Bombardment of Gra Ploven|orbital bombardment]] of the seas around their coastal cities.<ref name="SoL" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
